title: MetaGPT: Meta Programming for A Multi-Agent Collaborative Framework

defines.name: MetaGPT
defines.definition: A multi-agent meta-programming framework that encodes software-development standardized operating procedures into coordinated LLM agent workflows.

problem: Existing LLM-based multi-agent systems often fail on complex tasks because naive chaining causes cascading hallucinations, inconsistencies, and weak coordination.
